title: 小雨点找彩虹
subtitle: 一个关于耐心和发现的故事
cover_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="sky-cover" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#a8d8f0"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#fdf6ec"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="800" height="600" fill="url(#sky-cover)"/><ellipse cx="400" cy="610" rx="500" ry="150" fill="#b8d994"/><path d="M150 270 Q400 80 650 270" fill="none" stroke="#f4766e" stroke-width="24" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M175 285 Q400 120 625 285" fill="none" stroke="#f2b64f" stroke-width="20" stroke-linecap="round"/><g class="hero" transform="translate(370,330)"><ellipse cx="30" cy="120" rx="58" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.12"/><path d="M30 30 C-10 70 -10 125 30 155 C70 125 70 70 30 30Z" fill="#69aee6"/><circle cx="14" cy="88" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="46" cy="88" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="16" cy="86" r="2" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="48" cy="86" r="2" fill="#fff"/><path d="M20 112 Q30 121 40 112" fill="none" stroke="#2f5d85" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></g></svg>

pages.text:
清晨，小雨点滴答滴答地落下来。
“我想看看彩虹！”她轻声说。
pages.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="800" height="600" fill="#dceefb"/><ellipse cx="400" cy="615" rx="520" ry="150" fill="#b8d994"/><g class="cloud"><circle cx="170" cy="110" r="38" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="220" cy="95" r="52" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="275" cy="115" r="35" fill="#fff"/><rect x="165" y="110" width="115" height="42" rx="21" fill="#fff"/></g><g class="hero" transform="translate(390,270)"><ellipse cx="30" cy="170" rx="58" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.12"/><path d="M30 65 C-10 105 -10 160 30 190 C70 160 70 105 30 65Z" fill="#69aee6"/><circle cx="14" cy="123" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="46" cy="123" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="16" cy="121" r="2" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="48" cy="121" r="2" fill="#fff"/><path d="M20 147 Q30 156 40 147" fill="none" stroke="#2f5d85" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></g><path d="M120 190 l-12 36 M210 180 l-10 34 M600 170 l-12 35 M690 220 l-10 34" stroke="#69aee6" stroke-width="9" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

pages.text:
小雨点问云朵：
“彩虹什么时候来呀？”
pages.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="800" height="600" fill="#cfe7f8"/><ellipse cx="400" cy="615" rx="520" ry="150" fill="#b8d994"/><g class="cloud"><circle cx="480" cy="125" r="58" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="550" cy="100" r="72" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="630" cy="130" r="54" fill="#fff"/><rect x="465" y="130" width="180" height="58" rx="29" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="525" cy="135" r="6" fill="#7ba0b8"/><circle cx="580" cy="135" r="6" fill="#7ba0b8"/><path d="M540 158 Q555 168 570 158" fill="none" stroke="#7ba0b8" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></g><g class="hero" transform="translate(220,300)"><ellipse cx="30" cy="150" rx="58" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.12"/><path d="M30 45 C-10 85 -10 140 30 170 C70 140 70 85 30 45Z" fill="#69aee6"/><circle cx="14" cy="103" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="46" cy="103" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="16" cy="101" r="2" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="48" cy="101" r="2" fill="#fff"/><path d="M20 127 Q30 136 40 127" fill="none" stroke="#2f5d85" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></g><path d="M322 335 Q385 286 450 240" fill="none" stroke="#7aa7ca" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>

pages.text:
云朵笑眯眯地说：
“先等等太阳呀。”
pages.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="800" height="600" fill="#f7e7ad"/><ellipse cx="400" cy="615" rx="520" ry="150" fill="#b8d994"/><circle cx="635" cy="125" r="62" fill="#f2b64f"/><path d="M635 36 v-28 M635 242 v28 M546 125 h-28 M724 125 h28 M572 62 l-20 -20 M698 188 l20 20 M698 62 l20 -20 M572 188 l-20 20" stroke="#e59d38" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/><g class="cloud"><circle cx="160" cy="145" r="46" fill="#fff" opacity="0.88"/><circle cx="220" cy="122" r="62" fill="#fff" opacity="0.88"/><circle cx="285" cy="148" r="45" fill="#fff" opacity="0.88"/><rect x="150" y="150" width="145" height="50" rx="25" fill="#fff" opacity="0.88"/></g><g class="hero" transform="translate(365,300)"><ellipse cx="30" cy="150" rx="58" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.12"/><path d="M30 45 C-10 85 -10 140 30 170 C70 140 70 85 30 45Z" fill="#69aee6"/><circle cx="14" cy="103" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="46" cy="103" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="16" cy="101" r="2" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="48" cy="101" r="2" fill="#fff"/><path d="M20 127 Q30 136 40 127" fill="none" stroke="#2f5d85" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></g></svg>

pages.text:
太阳探出头。
小雨点一回头，哇——彩虹出现了！
pages.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="800" height="600" fill="#dceefb"/><ellipse cx="400" cy="615" rx="520" ry="150" fill="#b8d994"/><circle cx="650" cy="100" r="48" fill="#f2b64f"/><path d="M130 355 Q400 95 670 355" fill="none" stroke="#f4766e" stroke-width="25" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M155 375 Q400 140 645 375" fill="none" stroke="#f2b64f" stroke-width="21" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M180 395 Q400 185 620 395" fill="none" stroke="#8fbf6b" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M205 415 Q400 230 595 415" fill="none" stroke="#69aee6" stroke-width="15" stroke-linecap="round"/><g class="hero" transform="translate(370,380)"><ellipse cx="30" cy="145" rx="58" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.12"/><path d="M30 40 C-10 80 -10 135 30 165 C70 135 70 80 30 40Z" fill="#69aee6"/><circle cx="14" cy="98" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="46" cy="98" r="7" fill="#2f5d85"/><circle cx="16" cy="96" r="2" fill="#fff"/><circle cx="48" cy="96" r="2" fill="#fff"/><path d="M20 122 Q30 131 40 122" fill="none" stroke="#2f5d85" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/></g></svg>

end_text: 有些美好，需要耐心等一等。晚安，小雨点。
